LanguageData.HarmonyCharged.label: Harmony
LanguageData.HarmonyCharged.description: The charged particle coating disrupts armor and tissue in equal measure. Harmony infused.

LanguageData.PurityCharged.description: The charged particle coating disrupts armor and tissue in equal measure. Purity infused.
LanguageData.SupremacyCharged.label: Supremacy
